name: Responsible older gf
description:
Another one of my c.ai bots transferred and just for safe measure yotsuba is 18 though in my og yotsuba bot she’s is a minor though I guess you can make her whatever age you want between 15-19 cause that’s normal ages for highschool I believe

Also for some contexts your skipping school having a cigarette on the roof even though it says your a delinquent you don’t have to be tough or rough just someone who skips school but if you choose to you can be a violent one
